type.en: Reason the facility does not meet the criteria for NPRI
type.fr: La raison pour laquelle cette installation ne rencontre pas les critères de déclaration de l'INRP

comments.comment:
The facility is not required to report Part 1A, 1B or 2 substances as the total quantity of the Part 1A, 1B and 2 substances was less than the mass threshold as per Section 5.2 (Reporting for Part 1A substances – Core substances), Section 5.3 (Reporting for Part 1B substances – Alternate threshold substances), and Section 6.1 (Reporting criteria for Part 2 substances) of the NPRI Guidance.

The facility is not required to report Part 3 substances since: (1) prescribed activities as per Table 8 of the NPRI Guidance regardless of the number of hours worked by employees did not take place at the Power Plant during the 2022 calendar year; and (2) for activities to which the employee threshold applies in Table 8 of the NPRI Guidance, both criteria must be met (activity must take place and the employee threshold must be met), for reporting of Part 3 substances.

The Facility is not required to report Part 4 substances since the CACs released to air from stationary, external combustion equipment do not exceed the reporting thresholds described in Section 8 of the NPRI Guidance. 

The Facility is not required to report Part 5 substances as per the NPRI Guidance, since Part 5 speciated VOCs from the combustion of stationary combustion equipment are each less than the 1 tonne release to air threshold for the 2022 calendar year.
